task: I need to let my supervisor know I’ll be missing part of a shift and want to send a quick note before things get busy. Can you help me word it clearly so it covers the basics and is easy to send?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple, professional note you can send:

**Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I wanted to let you know that I’ll need to miss part of my shift on [date] from [time] to [time]. I’m letting you know in advance so you can plan accordingly. Please let me know if you need anything else from me. Thanks.**

If you want, I can also make it:
- more casual,
- more formal, or
- shorter for text message.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Clear enough and not too much. I can use that.
